About.Name: Van Huy Tran
About.AboutText:
Hi, I am Van Huy Tran. I'm a Computer Science student at Seattle Pacific University with a strong background in web and game development.

I’ve always been fascinated by how complex systems are built from the ground up, and I really enjoy the intersection of logic and creativity. Whether I'm designing a new web app, writing Python algorithms, or diving deep into game engines to tweak core mechanics, I like building things that just work well.

In my past roles, I've done a bit of everything—from assisting users at an IT Help Desk to developing fully functional web platforms and programming game logic.

When I'm away from the keyboard, you can usually find me analyzing the cinematography of older movies or lifting weights. I believe in the importance of continuous learning and seek out opportunities to explore new technologies and methodologies.

Experience.ExperienceText:
I’ve always been fascinated by how complex systems are built from the ground up, and I really enjoy the intersection of logic and creativity. Whether I'm designing a new web app, writing Python algorithms, or diving deep into game engines to tweak core mechanics, I like building things that just work well.

In my past roles, I've done a bit of everything—from assisting users at an IT Help Desk to developing fully functional web platforms and programming game logic.

When I'm away from the keyboard, you can usually find me analyzing the cinematography of older movies or lifting weights. I believe in the importance of continuous learning and seek out opportunities to explore new technologies and methodologies.
Experience.EducationText: I am currently completing my degree at Seattle Pacific University, where I was awarded the Transfer Merit Scholarship for International Students. My relevant coursework encompasses Data Structures and Algorithms, Computer Networks, and Object-Oriented Programming. Previously, I participated in a study abroad program at the University of Science, Viet Nam National University.
Experience.Employment: University of Science, Viet Nam National University
Experience.EmploymentText: In my role as a Web Developer, I built an e-commerce website and mobile application utilizing QT, JavaScript, and HTML/CSS. Prior to this, I served as a Game Developer, designing core mechanics for two distinct group projects using C++ and Python. I also have experience supporting campus operations and addressing customer inquiries through a Help Desk role.
Experience.SkillsText: I am proficient in programming languages such as C++, Python, and SQL. For statistical analysis, I rely exclusively on R programming to ensure higher accuracy, rather than utilizing standard data tables. Additionally, I am adept at working within environments like Visual Studio, GitHub, and MySQL, with a strong emphasis on clear communication and detail-oriented problem-solving.
